[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001101 3
1 1011101 5
2 0010100 2
3 0010110 3
4 0001101 3
5 0000100 1
6 1010001 3
7 0100110 3

01 10 1000001 2
12 21 0000000 a
23 32 0100000 1
34 43 0000100 1 match 5
45 54 0000000 a
56 65 0000000 a
67 76 0100000 1
70 07 0000001 1

02 20 0010000 1
13 31 0000100 1 match 5
24 42 0000000 a
35 53 0000000 a
46 64 0000100 1 match 5
57 75 0000001 1
60 06 0000000 a
71 17 0000001 1

03 30 0001000 1
14 41 0000100 1 match 5
25 52 0010000 1
36 63 0100100 2
47 74 0000000 a
50 05 1010001 3 match 6
61 16 0000100 1 match 5
72 27 0100000 1

04 40 0000000 a
15 51 1000001 2
26 62 0100000 1
37 73 0100000 1
